entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country that is the largest producer and consumer of pulses.

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Leguminous crops whose production has been stagnant in India.

entities.name: PULSES PRODUCTION TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The status and methods of producing pulses, including constraints and possibilities for increase.

entities.name: SHORT DURATION
entities.description: A characteristic of pulse varieties that can help increase production through area expansion.

entities.name: DISEASE PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: A characteristic of pulse varieties to be developed to improve production.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A micro-nutrient used to enhance the production of pulses.

entities.name: SULPHUR
entities.description: A micro-nutrient used to enhance the production of pulses.

entities.name: RABI PULSES
entities.description: Pulse crops grown in the winter season, suggested for area increase.

entities.name: MINIMUM SUPPORT PRICE
entities.description: A government-set price for pulse crops that is currently considered ineffective.

entities.name: MARKET PRICES
entities.description: The prevailing prices in the market that should influence the fixing of the minimum support price.
